# AIBguardian — Real-Time AI Safety Middleware
> Fail-closed dual-model audit engine (Claude Sonnet + Haiku). PASS/ALERT/CRITICAL verdicts on every AI response. Patent pending.

## Key facts
- Architecture: 3-layer (Identity, Guardian Middleware, Global Trust Network)
- Compliance: EU AI Act Article 28b, GDPR, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001
- Contact: info@aibguardian.info
